data.name: Vixens From Outer Space
data.detailed_description:
PREMISE

You were at home, enjoying dinner like any ordinary person. Suddenly, you are abducted by space amazons who unapologetically display their bare chests, disregarding the conventions of decorum that define 21st-century life on Earth.

You awaken in a deep-space facility, surrounded by impossible soldiers, absurd bureaucracies, and secrets no one is willing to clarify. Amid gunfights, conspiracies, and creatures beyond comprehension, a single question remains: Why were you chosen?

Vixens From Outer Space is a pulp-inspired shooter blending humor, Diesel War, sexual tension, and cosmic horror.

FEATURING

  • FEATURING Fully first-person immersive storytelling — the entire experience unfolds through the protagonist’s eyes.

  • Story-driven campaign — scripted moments, grounded pacing, and constant forward momentum.

  • Intense gunplay — brutal, up-close firefights with tight.

  • Time for relaxation… as these space amazons are certainly far from prudish.

GAME MODES

Campaign

A classic first-person linear campaign (around 2–3 hours) packed with action, comedy, sex, and a touch of romance.

  • 80% shooting

  • 10% dialogue

  • 2% cutscenes

  • 8% Interactive sex

  • 5 difficulty levels: from casual to nightmare

Horde

Horde Score Attack where enemys hordes.

A pure combat mode for players who just want to shoot.

  • 100% shooting

  • Score higher by speed, accuracy, and taking less damage

  • Fixed difficulty with time-based scaling

data.short_description: A single-player, immersive, story-driven FPS set in a pulpy, erotic sci-fi space opera — inspired by an era when science fiction was bold, messy, and excessive.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 法文, 義大利文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: i5 1.7GHz - 2.7GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1050
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 12 GB 可用空間
